subtitle: Age Structure Breakdown: China vs Japan (2025 Est.)
chartSubtitle: Share of total population by broad age cohort
chartNote: Values shown as share of total population.

insightCards.label: Japan (65+)
insightCards.description: World's highest elderly proportion. A super-aged society facing persistent labor shortages.

insightCards.label: China (65+)
insightCards.description: Rapidly aging. The workforce is shrinking before the nation reaches high-income status.

insightCards.label: Key Conclusion
insightCards.description: Japan manages a mature aging crisis, while China faces a steeper transition that challenges its traditional manufacturing advantage.
